content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Finding the Kth Prime". Refer to LeetCode description: https://www.spoj.com/problems/TDKPRIME/
content.inputFormat: The input will contain an integer K.
content.outputFormat: The output will be the Kth prime number.

solution.approach: Use the Sieve of Eratosthenes algorithm to generate prime numbers up to a certain limit, then find the Kth prime number.
